exploration_notes: The Trivy v0.27.1→v0.30.2 bump in commit 139f3a8 updated API call sites (db.NewClient gained insecure param, DetectVulnerabilities gained pkgID param, import paths moved from aquasecurity/fanal to aquasecurity/trivy/pkg/fanal) and registered new analyzers (pnpm, dotnet/deps). However, the ecosystem mapping tables were NOT updated: (1) LibraryMap in models/library.go is missing ftypes.PnpmLock ('pnpm-lock.yaml'), so pnpm lockfiles are never discovered; (2) GetLibraryKey() doesn't handle ftypes.Pn
